name: Nimrod Tweet Draft
description: Triggers NimrodAgent to generate bet slip images and tweet drafts. Runs 5 min before noon to have content ready for midday posting.

name: Auto-Resolve (Evening)
description: First resolve pass — marks picks as W/L for games that have finished. Catches most NBA/NCAAB games ending by 9:30 PM.

name: Auto-Resolve (Late Night)
description: Second resolve pass — catches late West Coast games, overtime finishes, and any games missed by the evening pass.

name: Suggestions Refresh
description: Runs full OrchestratorAgent pipeline 4x/day. Re-analyzes all upcoming games with latest injury, line, and stats data. Updates AI suggestions on the dashboard.

name: Auto-Scan
description: Scans for new games on the schedule that haven't been analyzed yet. Adds them to the pipeline for the next Suggestions Refresh cycle.

name: AP Poll Tracker
description: Pulls latest AP Top 25 rankings for NCAAB. Used by TrendsAgent for ranked vs unranked matchup analysis and upset detection.

name: News Feed Refresh
description: Aggregates sports news from configured feeds. Surfaces trade rumors, coaching changes, and lineup news that may affect upcoming games.

name: DB Backup
description: Full SQLite database backup. Runs alongside the late-night resolve pass. Stored locally for disaster recovery.

name: Agent Monitor
description: Watches all agent processes for crashes, timeouts, and anomalous output. Logs health metrics to errors.log.

name: Daily Maintenance
description: Complete daily maintenance cycle: auto-resolve all pending picks, run shadow learning on ALL games, update ML weights, clean up old data.

name: Shadow Learning
description: Analyzes ALL games (not just picked ones), resolves shadow picks, and updates ML model weights. Runs as part of the resolve pipeline to keep the learning loop tight.
